# Proxima Granite SEO

Technical SEO consulting and search visibility strategy for SaaS companies, B2B organizations, technology startups, and growth-focused businesses.

## Website

- [Proxima Granite SEO](https://www.proximagranite.com/)

## Founder

- Fred Fraser

## Core Expertise

- Technical SEO
- SEO Consulting
- Search Visibility Strategy
- Website Architecture
- Structured Data / Schema Markup
- AI Search Visibility
- Organic Search Growth
- Search Performance Auditing

- SaaS
- B2B Technology
- Software Companies
- Technology Startups
- Growing Organizations

- Technical SEO
- AI Search Optimization

- Entity SEO

- Organic Search Strategy
